tasks.label: iOS Simulator: Build Audio IO Example
iOS Simulator: Launch Audio IO Example
tasks.command: DEVICE=$(xcrun simctl list devices available | grep -m1 -i iphone | grep -oE '[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36}') && open -a Simulator && xcrun simctl boot "$DEVICE" 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl install "$DEVICE" build-ios-simulator/examples/ios/audio_io/Debug-iphonesimulator/audio_io.app && xcrun simctl launch "$DEVICE" com.tanh.audioio-ios

tasks.label: iOS Simulator: Build & Launch Audio IO Example
dependsOn: iOS Simulator: Build Audio IO Example
iOS Simulator: Launch Audio IO Example
